## cmd v0.0.2

### Fixes
- **Consistent language** in the browser — Essential and Useful tiers now use the same locale
- **install.sh** — fixes `command not found: cmd` after clone

### New
- **`cmd lang`** — interactive language menu (fzf)
- Useful commands translated: en / ru / zh

### Language menu
```bash
cmd lang          # fzf menu
cmd lang en       # direct
cmd lang ru
cmd lang zh
```

### Install / update
```bash
cd ~/scripts/cmd
git pull
bash install.sh
source ~/.zshrc
cmd lang en
```
